final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing avatar icon for a content creator account covering new energy vehicles, digital products, and everyday lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: flat icon / logo avatar
Composition: 
Subject: visual identity representing new energy vehicles, digital gadgets, and lifestyle products
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: culturally neutral and visually harmonious across both Chinese and international social platforms; must avoid any imagery that could be offensive or taboo to any cultural or religious group
Avoid: religious symbols, flags, political imagery, human faces, controversial iconography
